title: Allow person filter to select more than 1 person at a time
excerpt: Just like the title says. Allow the person filter to select more than 1 person/group at a time. I don’t want to have to create and manage a new team every time I want to filter a board for 2 or 3 individuals/groups simul…

posts.author: mbuisman (mike)
posts.cookedHtml: Just like the title says. Allow the person filter to select more than 1 person/group at a time. I don’t want to have to create and manage a new team every time I want to filter a board for 2 or 3 individuals/groups simultaneously.
